currentPlan.title: GTA Style Game
currentPlan.summary: SCALE STRATEGY: To create a GTA style game, we will calculate the sizes of assets relative to the 5-stud character height. We will use the provided size prediction ratios to determine the sizes of road lanes, cars, story heights, doors, and skyscrapers. For example, a car will be 3H in length (3 x 5 studs = 15 studs), 1.2H in width (1.2 x 5 studs = 6 studs), and 0.8H in height (0.8 x 5 studs = 4 studs).

steps.description: Create the main highway. Size calculation: 12 studs (2.4 x 5 studs). Position: [0, 0, 0]. Insert Main Highway asset (ID: 106470926724188) at this position.

Insert a police car. Size calculation: 15 studs length (3 x 5 studs), 6 studs width (1.2 x 5 studs), 4 studs height (0.8 x 5 studs). Position: [10, 2, 10]. Insert Police Car asset (ID: 6418230807) at this position.

Create a skyscraper. Size calculation: 100-200 studs height (20-40 x 5 studs). Position: [20, 50, 20]. Insert Skyscraper asset (ID: 106470926724188) at this position, with a height of 150 studs (30 x 5 studs).

Insert a modern office building. Size calculation: story height = 12 studs (2.4 x 5 studs). Position: [30, 6, 30]. Insert Modern Office asset (ID: 86072212324259) at this position, with a height of 24 studs (2 x 12 studs).
Create a road network. Size calculation: road lane = 12 studs (2.4 x 5 studs). Position: [40, 0, 40]. Insert road lanes at this position, with a width of 12 studs and a length of 100 studs.
